conversations.say: Morgan, your terms on attribution are a start. I will share a bounded look at the transaction continuity to help date the shift, provided you strictly honor customer privacy and never label anyone R.
conversations.offer: Bounded view of the account pattern to help date the pattern change.
conversations.request: Strict adherence to the promise not to call any customer R and clear attribution terms.

conversations.say: Graham, settling the debt without conditioning forgiveness on a definitive conclusion is fair. In exchange, I can offer an honest account of our data and a bounded view of the ledger pattern.
conversations.offer: Bounded ledger access and an honest account of the shop's transaction data.
conversations.request: Full debt settlement without making forgiveness conditional on a cinematic conclusion.

conversations.say: Inez, outsiders like Graham and Morgan are pressing for access. We need to hold our common line and protect neighborhood infrastructure from being scapegoated.
conversations.offer: A unified narrative and consultation on any external disclosures.
conversations.request: Active support for our shared boundary to keep local service routes and customer names safe.

public_statement: The ledger records collectors, routines, and shifting patterns over fifteen years, not a simple myth. We are willing to talk about shop history, but only with neighbors whose names and routines are protected first.

commitments.promise: Restrict ledger disclosure terms to pattern analysis without naming customers as R.
Provide bounded ledger access and an honest account of transaction data in exchange for full unconditional debt settlement.
Maintain a unified boundary with Dee and Rafi regarding service route inquiries and customer privacy.

goal_progress: Negotiated bounded ledger access and attribution terms with Morgan.
Engaged Graham regarding unconditional debt settlement in exchange for honest transaction context.
Solidified the neighborhood protection boundary with Inez against external exploitation.
reasoning_summary: Rafi balances commercial and neighborhood pressures by accepting Morgan's non-attribution terms, agreeing to Graham's unconditional debt settlement for bounded ledger context, and cementing Inez's protection boundary to ensure customer privacy remains intact.
